sentences.arabic: اشْتُهِرَ الْأَدَبُ الْعَرَبِيُّ الْقَدِيمُ بِالنَّثْرِ الْجَاحِظِيِّ الَّذِي يَتَمَيَّزُ بِدِقَّةِ الْمُلَاحَظَةِ وَسَلَاسَةِ الْعَرْضِ.
sentences.translation: Stara arapska književnost proslavila se Džahizovom prozom, koju karakterizira preciznost zapažanja i glatkoća izlaganja.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient Arabic literature was famous for Jahizian prose, which is characterized by precision of observation and smoothness of presentation.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَاحِظُ يَمْزِجُ بَيْنَ الْعِلْمِ وَالْأَدَبِ بِأُسْلُوبٍ يَجْذِبُ الْقَارِئَ وَيُحَفِّزُ عَقْلَهُ عَلَى التَّفْكِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Al-Jahiz je spajao nauku i književnost stilom koji privlači čitatelja i potiče njegov um na razmišljanje.
sentences.translationEn: Al-Jahiz blended science and literature in a style that attracts the reader and stimulates their mind to think.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَدْرَسَةُ الْأَدَبِيَّةُ عَلَى الِاسْتِطْرَادِ الْمُفِيدِ الَّذِي يُغْنِي الْمَوْضُوعَ بِأَفْكَارٍ جَانِبِيَّةٍ مُشَوِّقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova književna škola oslanja se na korisne digresije koje obogaćuju temu zanimljivim sporednim idejama.
sentences.translationEn: This literary school relies on useful digressions that enrich the topic with interesting side ideas.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْقُدْرَةَ عَلَى وَصْفِ الطَّبِيعَةِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ بِكُلِّ تَفَاصِيلِهَا جَعَلَتْ مِنْ هَذَا النَّثْرِ مَرْجِعًا خَالِدًا.
sentences.translation: Sposobnost opisivanja ljudske prirode u svim njenim detaljima učinila je ovu prozu vječnom referencom.
sentences.translationEn: The ability to describe human nature in all its details made this prose a timeless reference.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَفِيدُ الْكَاتِبُ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ هَذَا التُّرَاثِ فِي تَعَلُّمِ كَيْفِيَّةِ صِيَاغَةِ الْحُجَجِ الْمَنْطِقِيَّةِ بِقَالَبٍ جَمَالِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Današnji pisac koristi ovo naslijeđe učeći kako oblikovati logičke argumente u estetskom kalupu.
sentences.translationEn: Today's writer benefits from this heritage in learning how to formulate logical arguments in an aesthetic mold.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الْهَدَفُ مِنَ الْكِتَابَةِ نَقْلَ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ إِمْتَاعَ النَّفْسِ وَتَهْذِيبَ الذَّوْقِ.
sentences.translation: Cilj pisanja nije bio samo prenošenje informacija, već i uživanje duše i obrazovanje ukusa.
sentences.translationEn: The goal of writing was not only to convey information, but also to entertain the soul and refine the taste.

sentences.arabic: فَالنَّثْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ الرَّصِينُ يَبْنِي جِسْرًا بَيْنَ الْعَقْلِ وَالْعَاطِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga trezvena arapska proza gradi most između uma i emocija.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, sober Arabic prose builds a bridge between the mind and emotion.
